ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "patid" INTEGER /* Patid number for the client */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Program code for the client's program */,
  "preadmit_admission_date" TEXT /* Date of preadmit admission */,
  "date_of_discharge" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client or guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client or guardian */,
  "guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the guardian */,
  "guardian_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the guardian */,
  "guardian_email" TEXT /* Email address of the guardian */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the client */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral (e.g., school, hospital, self-referral) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the client (e.g., active, discharged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was completed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., CANS, ANSA) */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who conducted the assessment */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the clinician regarding the assessment */,
  "assessment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment */,
  "assessment_location" TEXT /* Location where the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_version" TEXT /* Version of the assessment tool used */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being scored */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client being scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the question */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who scored the question */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "score_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the score */,
  "score_version" TEXT /* Version of the scoring system used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who created the treatment plan */,
  "plan_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the clinician regarding the treatment plan */,
  "plan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment plan (e.g., individual, group) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_text" TEXT /* Text of the goal */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., met, unmet) */,
  "goal_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "goal_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "goal_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the goal */,
  "goal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the goal (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "goal_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the goal */,
  "goal_milestone" TEXT /* Milestones or checkpoints for the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_goals_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id")
)
